message:
chore(deps): refresh Cargo.lock for asupersync v0.2.0 from local path

The lock file was stale, still pointing to a git rev for asupersync.
This refresh aligns it with the Cargo.toml which already specifies
version = "0.2.0" with a local path override.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -199,15 +199,48 @@ dependencies = [
 [[package]]
 name = "asupersync"
 version = "0.2.0"
-source = "git+https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync.git?rev=22505d891736f59098607aaeb4a55149208f7b70#22505d891736f59098607aaeb4a55149208f7b70"
 dependencies = [
  "asupersync-macros",
  "base64 0.22.1",
  "bincode",
  "crossbeam-queue",
- "franken-decision",
- "franken-evidence",
- "franken-kernel",
+ "franken-decision 0.2.0",
+ "franken-evidence 0.2.0",
+ "franken-kernel 0.2.0",

+ "hmac",
+ "libc",

+ "socket2",

+ "tracing",

+ "visibility",
+]
+
+[[package]]
+name = "asupersync"
+version = "0.2.0"
+source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
+checksum = "f9d95a917dcf2042c90a91c7f24a2053bf228759950c212ea1bc58427cacd6c3"
+dependencies = [
+ "base64 0.22.1",
+ "bincode",
+ "crossbeam-queue",
+ "franken-decision 0.2.0 (registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index)",
+ "franken-evidence 0.2.0 (registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index)",
+ "franken-kernel 0.2.0 (registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index)",
  "getrandom 0.4.1",
  "hmac",
  "libc",
